results.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Harry Kane breaks silence on Jude Bellingham-Thomas Tuchel tension ahead of England vs Argentina
results.description: Harry Kane has dismissed speculation of tension between Jude Bellingham and Thomas Tuchel, insisting England's squad remains "completely together" ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final against Argentina. The England captain also defended Tuchel's candid criticism after the quarter-final win over Norway, saying the manager's honesty is one of his biggest strengths.

results.title: Nuvoco Vistas shares surge 8% on robust Q1 results, expansion plans
results.description: Profitability also strengthened during the quarter, with Nuvoco Vistas EBITDA per tonne rising by ₹90 compared with the previous quarter, driven by continued cost optimisation initiatives and operational efficiencies.

results.title: US CENTCOM Strikes Bushehr And Bandar As Iran Conflict Raises Fears Of Wider Regional War | News18
results.description: | The U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) says American forces have struck key military sites in Iran's Bushehr and Bandar regions, marking another major escalation in the conflict. With the Strait of Hormuz remaining a critical flashpoint for global shipping and energy supplies, fears are growing that the confrontation could expand into a wider regional crisis. Watch the full report for the latest military developments, geopolitical analysis, and international reactions. n18oc_breaking-news News18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube
